name: Tepna
description: A fleet of local-only, single-signal physiological analyzers. Read one raw biosignal from a wearable you own — oxygen, heartbeat, pulse, glucose — derive evidence-graded metrics, and fuse across signals. 100% in your browser: no upload, no account.
disclaimer: Personal self-quantification. Not a medical device; does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any condition.
featureList: 100% local — no network, no upload, no account
Evidence-graded metrics (every number carries a trust badge)
OxyDex: SpO₂ / oximetry — Overnight blood oxygen — ODI-4, T90, hypoxic burden.
PpgDex: Wrist PPG — Optical pulse → PPI → HRV + pulse-wave morphology.
PulseDex: HRV from raw RR — RR-interval streams → time / frequency HRV.
ECGDex: Raw ECG — ~130 Hz ECG → QRS, QTc, HRV.
HRVDex: HRV summaries — Additive multi-day HRV ledger.
GlucoDex: CGM — Continuous glucose → Time in Range, GMI.
CPAPDex: CPAP therapy — EDF therapy data → pressure, leak, respiratory events.
